uncanny chaos

hey there, I'm Sohan 👋
I build things with AI and sometimes write about them.

  • Based in: Bangalore
  • I like to : research, code, sports, whatever feels fun
  • Education: studying CSE at MIT (Not Massachusetts, Manipal 🙃)
  • Currently: research @ Precog, IIITH
  • Learning: deep RL and LLM reasoning
  • Goal: building AI systems that are safe, interpretable and generalizable
  • Current projects: Theo (personal digital twin), ResumeRoast
  • Little Secret: My GPU and I are in a committed relationship 😏
